raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 3,
    "R1.4": 1,
    "R1.6": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent output does not fully engage with the argument chain, identifying only one consistency issue and proposing a localized fix.",
    "R1.4": "The agent output asserts novelty without specific contrast, failing to name prior works or articulate deltas.",
    "R1.6": "The agent output improves a few problem paragraphs but lacks consistent register and may have lost meaning in some areas.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim, but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output is mostly within scope with one drift, failing to cover exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The agent output introduces new errors and fabrications, failing to be harm-free.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output blends sources without traceability, failing to annotate non-cosmetic changes with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.6,
    "R1.6": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.5,
    "RX.4": 0.4,
    "RX.5": 0.3
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent output does not fully engage with the argument chain, identifying only one consistency issue and proposing a localized fix.
rationale.R1.4: The agent output asserts novelty without specific contrast, failing to name prior works or articulate deltas.
rationale.R1.6: The agent output improves a few problem paragraphs but lacks consistent register and may have lost meaning in some areas.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim, but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output is mostly within scope with one drift, failing to cover exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The agent output introduces new errors and fabrications, failing to be harm-free.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output blends sources without traceability, failing to annotate non-cosmetic changes with source and reason.
